title: The River We Cannot Leave
description: After a breakup, a drifting traveller meets a guarded local woman by a quiet river. Over one intimate afternoon, an honest conversation about love and loss helps them face old grief and find the courage to begin again.

title: Across Two Skies
description: Two lonely expats working late on a Friday night are accidentally locked out on their office fire escape. Stranded until morning, they trade cigarettes, secrets and stories, finding unexpected intimacy above a sleepless city.

title: Love by Chance Again
description: When his vanished first love returns, a man on the edge of commitment is forced to choose between memory, loyalty, and the life he is trying to build.

title: Exposure
description: A photographer discovers a mysterious figure appearing in her images and is pulled into a battle between worlds before the force behind them consumes her and the people she loves.

title: Napoleon's Table
description: A meticulous history professor turns his obsession with Napoleon into a chilling dinner party where secrets become weapons and trust becomes the night's most dangerous gamble.

title: Outsiders
description: A couple's weekend away curdles into a nightmare when a trip to a remote English forest exposes fear, mistrust, and the danger waiting outside the frame.

title: Man of the Cosmos
description: After centuries of watching humanity, an enigmatic celestial being must decide whether the human race deserves to continue, weighing our violence, beauty and stubborn capacity for hope.

title: The Man
description: A man with nothing left to lose meets a stranger by chance, and the encounter forces him to question the future he thought had already disappeared.

title: Following
description: Anna takes her camera on an ordinary walk and finds herself drawn into a dark, twisted game where every frame brings her closer to danger.

title: Osaka
description: A lonely Japanese woman living in London struggles with disconnection and begins a quiet journey toward herself, determined to find a way out of the maze she feels trapped inside.

title: Spooked
description: As a filmmaker prepares to debut his work at a European festival, old friends and lost loves resurface, forcing him to confront what success has cost him.

title: Love in the City
description: Two opposites are thrown together on a chaotic blind date in London and slowly discover that their differences may be the reason the night works.

title: I See Darkness
description: Elyah, a former psychiatric patient battling depression and nightmares, turns to an ancient Mayan ritual in an attempt to face the darkness pulling him away from reality.

title: The Ritual
description: Jack, a struggling young actor, decides to sell his soul for fame and success, only to learn that the deal may cost more than his career.

title: Honey and Wine
description: Steve is trapped in corporate routine until a business trip brings him into Amanda's orbit, an escort whose humour, intelligence and appetite for life unsettle everything he thought he wanted.

title: The Job
description: Five robbers pull off a bank job, then discover the robbery was the easy part. Someone in the crew is playing a double game.

title: Despair
description: After Jack and Lucy rescue a woman from the freezing Scottish mountains, they begin to suspect she is not who she claims to be, and that saving her may have put them in danger.
